command.status.description: Show the current status of the George Recovery quest.
command.setstage.description: Testing command: set the quest stage. Values: notstarted, collecting, materials, declined, completed.
event.accepted.harvey-knew: I knew I could count on you, @!$h
event.accepted.request: Please place one Rabbit's Foot in the refrigerator upstairs in my room.
dialogue.george.wed8: Harvey says my recovery is going very well.#$e#I can already take a few slow steps. Next time, I'll have to show Alex.$h
dialogue.george.tue10: I exercise my legs every day, just like Harvey taught me.#$e#Slow and steady. Each day is a little better than the last.$h
dialogue.evelyn.fri: George has been getting up and moving around every day lately.#$e#Seeing him grow steadier with every step puts my mind at ease.$h
dialogue.evelyn.summer-tue: The warm weather has put George in good spirits. He works hard on his rehabilitation every day.#$e#We've known each other for sixty years. I can tell he has more confidence now!$h
event.opening.george-rain: My legs always hurt terribly when it rains.$s
event.opening.george-rehab: Harvey comes by every week to help with my rehabilitation. Maybe one day I'll stand again.
event.opening.george-evelyn: Evelyn has had to carry too much. Sometimes I hate that I can't stand on my own.$s
event.opening.harvey-condition: George's leg injury is serious, but there may still be something we can do.
event.opening.harvey-request: @, would you be willing to help me?
event.opening.question: Will you accept Harvey's request?
event.opening.declined: All right. I can manage George's treatment on my own.$s
event.finale.george-doctor: Hey, @. Harvey is a fine doctor. He managed to treat my legs, even if I'm still a little unsteady.$h
event.finale.george-thanks: And I have you to thank, too. I wouldn't have recovered this quickly without your help.$h
event.finale.george-future: I'll keep up with my rehabilitation. When I'm ready, I'd like to walk into town on my own.$h
materials.none:
You don't have any of the treatment materials currently needed.

{{progress}}
materials.complete:
You close the refrigerator. All of Harvey's treatment supplies have been collected!

Visit George's house between 9:00 and 18:00 on a non-festival day.
